hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什预计将在央行利率前景中保留“点”；【CRYPTO】UNI 代币飙升，而加密货币市场的其他部分则向美联储 Warsh 寻求指导；【CRYPTO】忘掉零售交易者吧：真正价值数万亿美元的加密货币未来是为机器构建基础设施。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh expected to withhold 'dot' from central bank's interest rate outlook
items.summary: The central bank's Federal Open Market Committee is set to release its quarterly update of where individual officials expect interest rates to head.
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什预计将在央行利率前景中保留“点”
items.summary_zh: 央行联邦公开市场委员会将发布个人官员预期利率走向的季度更新。

items.title: UNI token surges while rest of crypto market looks to Fed's Warsh for guidance
items.summary: The Federal Open Markets Committee is set to announce the first interest-rate decision under Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, who then faces questions from journalists.
items.title_zh: UNI 代币飙升，而加密货币市场的其他部分则向美联储 Warsh 寻求指导
items.summary_zh: 联邦公开市场委员会将宣布美联储主席凯文·沃什领导下的第一个利率决定，随后沃什将接受记者提问。

items.title: Forget retail traders: The real multi-trillion-dollar crypto future is building infrastructure for machines
items.summary: While legacy banks keep corporate money idled in slow regional accounts, a new protocol allows software systems to settle multi-currency trade instantly.
items.title_zh: 忘掉零售交易者吧：真正价值数万亿美元的加密货币未来是为机器构建基础设施
items.summary_zh: 虽然传统银行将企业资金闲置在缓慢的区域账户中，但新协议允许软件系统立即结算多货币交易。

items.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial nears OCC approval for federal trust charter: report
items.summary: The federal trust bank charter grant would allow World Liberty to issue and redeem its USD1 stablecoin under a single federal regulator.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的世界自由金融公司即将获得 OCC 批准联邦信托宪章：报告
items.summary_zh: 联邦信托银行特许授权将允许 World Liberty 在单一联邦监管机构的监管下发行和赎回其 1 美元稳定币。

items.title: Live markets: Markets turn their focus to the Fed as oil returns to pre-war levels
items.summary: Bitcoin's Sharpe ratio hit a level that has marked every cycle low since 2015, but in each case it preceded months of basing rather than an immediate rebound.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：随着油价恢复至战前水平，市场将焦点转向美联储
items.summary_zh: 比特币的夏普比率达到了自 2015 年以来每个周期低点的水平，但在每种情况下，它都是在几个月的基础上而不是立即反弹之前发生的。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
items.summary: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".
items.title_zh: 尽管特朗普批评，以色列对黎巴嫩发动新的打击
items.summary_zh: 特朗普周二表示，以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡需要“对黎巴嫩更加负责”。

items.title: Live Updates: After G7 Leaders Praise U.S.-Iran Deal, Trump Threatens Iran Again
items.summary: President Trump said the United States would resume bombing Iran if he did not like the preliminary agreement, hours after leaders from the Group of 7 nations called the deal a “breakthrough.”
items.title_zh: 实时更新：七国集团领导人赞扬美伊协议后，特朗普再次威胁伊朗
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，如果他不喜欢初步协议，美国将恢复轰炸伊朗，数小时前七国集团领导人称该协议是“突破”。

items.title: Three Fed signals that could make bitcoin pop
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for June 17, 2026
items.title_zh: 美联储发出的三个信号可能会让比特币流行
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 17 日天气预报

items.title: Senate, House reach agreement on housing bill banning CBDC through 2030
items.summary: US Senate and House leaders have jointly released an updated version of a housing legislation that includes a CBDC ban.
items.title_zh: 参众两院就住房法案达成协议，到 2030 年禁止 CBDC
items.summary_zh: 美国参议院和众议院领导人联合发布了住房立法的更新版本，其中包括 CBDC 禁令。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 合作伙伴网络简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出合作伙伴网络，投资 1.5 亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其在现实世界的部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's tempted to bet against SpaceX, but passes on expensive options
items.summary: Burry argued the company's market capitalization had reached levels that dwarf many established businesses and fortunes.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，他很想做空 SpaceX，但放弃了昂贵的选择
items.summary_zh: 伯里认为，该公司的市值已达到令许多老牌企业和财富相形见绌的水平。

items.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
items.summary: The retired couple tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course in the English Channel before the shots were fired.
items.title_zh: 英国调查报告称俄罗斯军舰在英吉利海峡附近的游艇附近鸣枪示警
items.summary_zh: 这对退休夫妇告诉英国广播公司《新闻之夜》，他们试图向军舰展示在开枪之前他们已经在英吉利海峡改变了航向。

items.title: Bahrain Revoked Their Citizenship, and Then Tried to Expel Them to Iran
items.summary: Amid the war with Iran, Bahrain has stripped 69 people of their citizenship, including children, accusing them of disloyalty and rendering them stateless.
items.title_zh: 巴林撤销了他们的公民身份，然后试图将他们驱逐到伊朗
items.summary_zh: 在与伊朗的战争中，巴林剥夺了 69 人的公民身份，其中包括儿童，指责他们不忠并使他们成为无国籍人。

items.title: Naval Mines Could Still Stymie Gulf Shipping After War
items.summary: The U.S. Navy will be deploying a new generation of drone-based countermeasures to search the sea floor and surface for any mines Iran laid.
items.title_zh: 战后水雷仍可能阻碍海湾航运
items.summary_zh: 美国海军将部署新一代无人机反制措施，在海底和海面搜寻伊朗埋设的水雷。

items.title: Russian Navy Ship Fired Warning Shots Near British Couple’s Sailboat
items.summary: Britain’s Ministry of Defense said that the Russian vessel appeared to be trying to avoid a collision in the English Channel.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯海军舰艇在英国夫妇的帆船附近鸣枪警告
items.summary_zh: 英国国防部表示，这艘俄罗斯船只似乎试图避免在英吉利海峡发生碰撞。

items.title: Zama, Morpho and Steakhouse launch first ‘confidential DeFi yield’ vault on Ethereum
items.summary: Zama, Morpho and Steakhouse launch the first confidential DeFi yield vault on Ethereum, letting firms earn yield without exposed balances.
items.title_zh: Zama、Morpho 和 Steakhouse 在以太坊上推出首个“机密 DeFi 收益”金库
items.summary_zh: Zama、Morpho 和 Steakhouse 在以太坊上推出了第一个机密 DeFi 收益金库，让公司无需暴露余额即可赚取收益。

items.title: US gaming industry groups urge Senate to ban sports prediction markets in crypto bill: report
items.summary: US gaming groups called on Congress to ban sports and casino-style prediction markets in a crypto market structure bill, Semafor reported.
items.title_zh: 美国游戏行业团体敦促参议院在加密法案中禁止体育预测市场：报告
items.summary_zh: 据 Semafor 报道，美国游戏组织呼吁国会在加密货币市场结构法案中禁止体育和赌场式的预测市场。

items.title: Pump.fun activity craters 80% in three months, dragging Solana fees lower as traders rotate into perps
items.summary: The platform's fall from grace is best reflected in the PUMP token itself, which is down 40% in the last six months alone.
items.title_zh: Pump.fun 活动在三个月内下降了 80%，随着交易员转为 Perps，Solana 费用下降
items.summary_zh: 该平台的失势最能体现在 PUMP 代币本身上，仅在过去六个月内就下跌了 40%。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Prediction market traders speculate Anthropic will restore access quickly to AI model after Trump admin directed it to limit reach
items.summary: Traders think it's more likely than not that access is restored by July 1.

items.title: Bitcoin's June downturn leaves $8.6 billion in options out of the money
items.summary: Only 20% of June 26 options open interest is currently in the money, while bitcoin's 12% monthly decline leaves most bullish positions underwater.

items.summary_zh: 目前，6 月 26 日期权未平仓合约中只有 20% 处于实值状态，而比特币每月 12% 的跌幅使大多数看涨头寸陷入困境。

items.title: Forget the price charts. Here's how bitcoin and S&P 500 look like when adjusted for the money printer

items.title: Coinbase unveils ‘System Update’ unlocking an AI advisor, global unified liquidity, options trading and more
items.summary: Coinbase's latest System Update includes a new AI-powered advisor and global unified liquidity between its U.S. and international platforms.

items.summary_zh: Coinbase 的最新系统更新包括新的人工智能顾问以及美国和国际平台之间的全球统一流动性。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: China pushes for AI safety as G7 summit wraps up without Beijing
items.summary: China included artificial intelligence in its global governance whitepaper published Wednesday, and said Beijing was speeding up cooperation efforts.

items.summary_zh: 中国将人工智能纳入周三发布的全球治理白皮书，并表示北京正在加快合作步伐。

items.title: The new oil? Inside the effort to turn AI computing power into a tradeable commodity
items.summary: AI compute futures could eventually rival some of the world's largest commodity markets, Silicon Data's Carmen Li believes.
items.title_zh: 新油？将人工智能计算能力转变为可交易商品的努力
items.summary_zh: Silicon Data 的 Carmen Li 认为，人工智能计算未来最终可能会与世界上一些最大的商品市场相媲美。

items.title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
items.summary: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.
items.title_zh: 这次中国人看世界杯的方式不一样了
items.summary_zh: 12个多小时的时差和各种流媒体选项正在影响中国人观看世界杯的方式。

items.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
items.summary: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.
items.title_zh: CFTC 主席 Selig 为美国批准“perps”的决定进行辩护
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·塞利格(Michael Selig)表示，现有企业总是担心未来，但重要的是在国内而不是仅在海外开发新的资产类别。

items.title: SpaceX IPO leaves retail investors with too few shares and a tough hold-or-sell decision
items.summary: Those who did receive stock are taking different approaches, with some selling into the company's market debut while others holding for the long haul.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股让散户投资者持有的股票太少，并且面临持有或出售的艰难决定
items.summary_zh: 那些确实收到股票的人正在采取不同的方法，一些人在公司首次上市时出售，而另一些人则长期持有。

items.title: SpaceX doesn't have a timeline for its human missions to Mars. Kalshi traders say don't expect it this decade
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi see only an 18% chance the Elon Musk-led company gets to Earth's neighbor by 2030.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 没有载人火星任务的时间表。卡尔希贸易商称这十年不会出现这种情况
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员认为，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司到 2030 年到达地球邻居的可能性只有 18%。

items.title: Ron Baron bought $1 billion of SpaceX shares in IPO, lifting stake to $25 billion
items.summary: "I think we're gonna make hundreds of billions of dollars," Baron said Monday on CNBC's "Squawk Box."
items.title_zh: Ron Baron 在 IPO 中购买了 10 亿美元的 SpaceX 股票，将持股比例提升至 250 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 巴伦周一在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中表示：“我认为我们将赚取数千亿美元。”

items.title: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
items.summary: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.
items.title_zh: 以色列民族主义者无视规则，耶路撒冷圣地的现状受到威胁
items.summary_zh: 以色列民族主义者越来越多地蔑视关于信仰如何共享阿克萨清真寺大院的公约。

items.title: Brazil convicts Jair Bolsonaro's son of pursuing US help in father's legal battle
items.summary: Eduardo Bolsonaro called the conviction "baseless and senseless".
items.title_zh: 巴西判定雅伊尔·博尔索纳罗的儿子在父亲的法律诉讼中寻求美国帮助
items.summary_zh: 爱德华多·博尔索纳罗称这一判决“毫无根据、毫无意义”。

items.title: 'They came with machetes' - deadline looms for migrants to leave South Africa
items.summary: Protesters have set 30 June as the date for all undocumented migrants to leave the country.
items.title_zh: “他们带着砍刀来了”——移民离开南非的最后期限迫在眉睫
items.summary_zh: 抗议者将 6 月 30 日定为所有无证移民离开该国的日期。

items.title: Norway's crown princess undergoes successful lung transplant, palace says
items.summary: Crown Princess Mette-Marit, who suffered from pulmonary fibrosis, will now spend several weeks recovering in hospital.
items.title_zh: 挪威王储妃成功接受肺移植手术
items.summary_zh: 患有肺纤维化的王储妃梅特玛丽特现在将在医院康复数周。

items.title: Australian shock jock wins A$12m payout after radio station tore up contract
items.summary: Kyle Sandilands was sacked after an on-air spat with his co-host, who accused him of bullying.
items.title_zh: 广播电台撕毁合同后，澳大利亚冲击运动员赢得了 1200 万澳元的赔偿
items.summary_zh: 凯尔·桑迪兰兹在与他的搭档主持人发生口角后被解雇，搭档指责他欺凌他人。

items.title: Equatorial Guinea government resigns after failing to meet targets
items.summary: The vice-president says the government had barely reached 10% of its targets, without specifying them.
items.title_zh: 赤道几内亚政府因未能实现目标而辞职
items.summary_zh: 这位副总统表示，政府仅完成了目标的 10%，但没有具体说明。

items.title: Leader of South Africa's second biggest party wants his predecessor sacked as minister
items.summary: John Steenhuisen is one of South Africa's best-known politicians after leading the DA for seven years.
items.title_zh: 南非第二大党领袖希望解除前任部长职务
items.summary_zh: 约翰·史汀惠森 (John Steenhuisen) 领导民主联盟七年，是南非最著名的政治家之一。

items.title: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says
items.summary: In newly unsealed court filings, the government says the group allegedly expressed grievances about corruption, the Epstein files, and data centres.
items.title_zh: FBI 称，该组织计划使用狙击手和无人机袭击白宫 UFC 赛事
items.summary_zh: 在新公布的法庭文件中，政府表示，该组织据称对腐败、爱泼斯坦档案和数据中心表示不满。

items.title: Ukraine Tries to Cut Off Crimea, Choking Russian Supply Routes
items.summary: Scores of targeted attacks against supply routes, part of what Kyiv calls a “logistics lockdown,” has caused gasoline shortages.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰试图切断克里米亚，切断俄罗斯供应路线
items.summary_zh: 数十起针对供应路线的有针对性的攻击（基辅所谓的“物流封锁”的一部分）导致了汽油短缺。

items.title: After a Bitter Split, European Leaders Play Nice With Trump
items.summary: A peace framework with Iran, and hope for cooperation with Ukraine, softened the tone on Tuesday at a Group of 7 gathering in France.
items.title_zh: 痛苦分裂后，欧洲领导人与特朗普相处融洽
items.summary_zh: 周二在法国举行的七国集团会议上，与伊朗的和平框架以及与乌克兰合作的希望软化了基调。

items.title: Congo Returns to World Cup in High Style After 52 Years Away
items.summary: The soccer stars’ sharp black suits with leopard-print details are a nod to a long history of “sapeur” fashion.
items.title_zh: 刚果队阔别 52 年后强势重返世界杯
items.summary_zh: 足球明星们穿着带有豹纹细节的犀利黑色西装，是对“sapeur”时尚悠久历史的致敬。

items.title: How Ecuador’s Andes Created a Language of Its Own
items.summary: In Ecuador’s highlands, a seamless mix of Kichwa and Spanish creates a language that bends grammar, adds melody and goes unnoticed by many who speak it every day.
items.title_zh: 厄瓜多尔的安第斯山脉如何创造自己的语言
items.summary_zh: 在厄瓜多尔的高地，基奇瓦语和西班牙语的无缝混合创造了一种语言，它改变了语法，增加了旋律，却被许多每天说这种语言的人忽视了。

items.title: Australia’s Former Electricity Substations Are Being Turned Into Homes
items.summary: In a country where the housing market is squeezed, decommissioned electrical substations are in demand as refurbished residences.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚前变电站正在改建为住宅
items.summary_zh: 在一个房地产市场受到挤压的国家，退役的变电站作为翻新住宅的需求很大。

items.title: Can a Trump-Modi Meeting Reset U.S.-India Relations?
items.summary: Despite mutual praise between the two leaders, there has been a series of setbacks to U.S. relations with India since they last met more than a year ago.
items.title_zh: 特朗普-莫迪会晤能否重置美印关系？
items.summary_zh: 尽管两国领导人相互赞扬，但自一年多前上次会面以来，美国与印度的关系出现了一系列挫折。

items.title: Heir to 135-year Gulf dynasty is moving a $6 trillion trade market onto blockchain rails
items.summary: Abdulla Kanoo says his ARP Digital firm is building settlement infrastructure for the growing flow of trade between emerging economies, a market that could reach $32 trillion by 2030.
items.title_zh: 135 年海湾王朝的继承人正在将 6 万亿美元的贸易市场转移到区块链轨道上
items.summary_zh: 阿卜杜拉·卡努 (Abdulla Kanoo) 表示，他的 ARP Digital 公司正在为新兴经济体之间日益增长的贸易流量建设结算基础设施，该市场到 2030 年可能达到 32 万亿美元。

items.title: BitGo offers Europe’s crypto firms a MiCA-compliance lifeline as license deadline looms
items.summary: BaFin-regulated BitGo says its Crypto-as-a-Service platform can help eligible crypto players across Europe with an alternative way to navigate MiCA.
items.title_zh: 随着许可证截止日期的临近，BitGo 为欧洲加密货币公司提供了 MiCA 合规生命线
items.summary_zh: 受 BaFin 监管的 BitGo 表示，其加密货币即服务平台可以帮助欧洲合格的加密货币玩家以另一种方式导航 MiCA。

items.title: Crypto PAC's $12 million Senate candidate, Barry Moore, wins Alabama GOP primary
items.summary: The Trump loyalist drew more crypto dollars than any candidate so far in this year's midterms, and the result marks a big win for the industry's political arm.
items.title_zh: Crypto PAC 的 1200 万美元参议员候选人巴里·摩尔 (Barry Moore) 赢得阿拉巴马州共和党初选
items.summary_zh: 这位特朗普的忠实支持者在今年的中期选举中获得的加密美元比迄今为止任何候选人都多，这一结果标志着该行业政治部门的巨大胜利。

items.title: XRP gives back breakout gains, slipping below $1.23 on heavy selling
items.summary: XRP briefly traded above key resistance before sellers stepped in, with rising volume suggesting traders used the rally to cut positions rather than add risk.
items.title_zh: XRP 回吐突破性涨幅，因大量抛售而跌破 1.23 美元
items.summary_zh: 在卖家介入之前，XRP 短暂交投于关键阻力位之上，成交量不断增加，表明交易者利用反弹来削减头寸，而不是增加风险。

items.title: ‘Long-term holders are hodling’: K33 says record supply metric suggests bear market may be nearing an end
items.summary: K33 said stabilizing conditions and trading activity falling back to yearly lows reflect a market where holders are reluctant to sell.
items.title_zh: “长期持有者正在持有”：K33表示创纪录的供应指标表明熊市可能已接近尾声
items.summary_zh: K33表示，情况趋于稳定，交易活动回落至年度低点，反映出持有人不愿出售的市场。

items.title: Australia’s High Court backs regulator in Block Earner crypto yield case
items.summary: Australia’s High Court unanimously ruled that Block Earner required a financial services licence, overturning a 2025 appeal decision.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚高等法院在 Block Earner 加密收益案中支持监管机构
items.summary_zh: 澳大利亚高等法院一致裁定 Block Earner 需要金融服务许可证，推翻了 2025 年的上诉裁决。

items.summary: A group of bipartisan senators pressed the Treasury Department to preserve states' ability to regulate stablecoins.

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.title_zh: 天体物理学家如何使用 Codex 帮助模拟黑洞

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Ona
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 计划收购 Ona，以通过安全、持久的云环境扩展 Codex，从而实现跨企业工作流程长期运行的 AI 代理。

items.summary: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.

items.summary_zh: 一种新的机器人空间记忆系统可以有效地捕捉它们在探索环境时看到的物体的细节。

items.summary: The fellowships in applied sciences, engineering, and mathematics recognize doctoral students who are pursuing solutions to the most pressing challenges in science and technology.
